name: Hayaken no Shiro
text: Action: Bow this stronghold. Choose a Bushi character with printed cost 2 or lower – ready that character.

name: Breaking In
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – search the top 8 cards of your dynasty deck for a character and put it into this province faceup. If that character has the Cavalry trait, you may put it faceup into any province you control instead. Shuffle.

name: The Pursuit of Justice
text: Action: During a conflict at a [water] province, choose a participating character – ready that character.

name: Kuni Purifier
text: Reaction: After an opponent passes on declaring a conflict – that opponent discards 1 random card from their hand.

name: Veteran of Toshi Ranbo
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
This character gets +1 glory for each faceup province you control.

name: Crippling Taxes
text:
Keeper role only.
Action: Choose a province – discard each card in that province.

name: Stoic Rival
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character with fewer attachments than this character – dishonor this character.

name: Hidden Mountain Pass
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Interrupt: When the conflict phase ends, if this holding's province is unbroken – turn that province facedown.

name: Ikoma Tsanuri
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Action: During conflicts in which this character is participating, your opponent cannot trigger abilities on the attacked province.

name: Isawa Tsuke
text:
Pride
Action: During a conflict, if the [fire] ring is in the unclaimed ring pool, lose 1 or more honor. Choose an equal number of participating characters – remove 1 fate from each of those characters.

name: Celebrated Renown
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Action: Choose a character with the most fate on it among characters in play – honor that character.

name: Shadow Stalker
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
While you have 6 or fewer honor, this character gets +2[mil] and +2[pol].

name: Open Window
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Action: During a conflict, choose a Shinobi character you control – move that character to the conflict.

name: Ride at Dawn
text:
Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province faceup.)
Reaction: After you pass during the dynasty phase – each opponent who has not yet passed discards 1 random card from their hand.

name: Mercenary Company
text:
No attachments except Weapon. Rally.
Forced Reaction: After this character loses a conflict – your opponent may move 1 fate from their fate pool to this character. If they do, they gain control of it. (Unlimited.)

name: Sturdy Tetsubō
text:
Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.)
Attached character gains: "Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – your opponent discards 1 card from their hand. (Limit twice per round.)"

name: Local Daimyō's Retainer
text: You can only play this card if you control at least 3 faceup provinces.

name: Asceticism
text:
Earth role only
While 2 or more of your non-stronghold provinces are facedown, attached character cannot be chosen as a target of an opponent's triggered ability.

name: Under Siege
text:
Fire role only.
Reaction: After a conflict is declared – the defending player sets their hand aside, facedown and out of play. If they do, they draw 5 cards. At the end of the conflict, that player discards their hand and adds the set-aside cards to their hands. (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: Kyofuki's Hammer
text: Reaction: After attached character wins a conflict, choose a card in a province – discard that card. (Unlimited.).

name: Forgery
text: Interrupt: When the effects of an event would initiate, if you are less honorable than the player initiating those effects – cancel those effects.

name: Steed of the Steppes
text:
Attached character gains the Cavalry trait
Action: If an opponent controls 3 or more faceup provinces, sacrifice this attachment – ready attached character.
